title: Graphic Overhaul
description:
this is a optimization  and graphic pack.

- this is my first modpack if you find any bugh msg me on discord at rands2 -
body:
The Graphic Overhaul modpack aims to add a grapicly improved and optimized soulution for minecraft users. The best optimization and grapic inhanceing mods are installed to make the best minecraft playthrough possable.

This adds Quality of life mods, Preformance Mods, Grapic mods, and optimization mods. 
If you have any questions concirnes comments or wish me to make it for another version msg me on discord at **rands2**.  

currently supported ver.
1.20.4

- This is my first modpack so please enjoy -
